name: Sourdough Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together, working in the flour until a good dough forms.
2. Divide the dough into two parts and roll each out into thin cakes about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Dot each half with butter.
4. Sprinkle each half with 1/4 to 1/2 cup of brown sugar mixed with 1 teaspoon cinnamon or to your taste.
5. Roll the dough into foot-long lengths.
6. Cut off 1-inch slices and place them in a pan that has been prepared with a mixture of 2 tablespoons melted butter, 1 tablespoon liquid coffee, 2 tablespoons brown sugar, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, and a dash of salt.
7. Let the dough rise for about an hour before baking at 325 degrees F. Serve with sticky side up.
